title: Purnagad Fort
tagline: Purnagad Fort — heritage city of Maharashtra

overview.short: Purnagad Fort is a fort located 25 km from Ratnagiri, in Ratnagiri district, of Maharashtra.
overview.description: Purnagad Fort is a fort located 25 km from Ratnagiri, in Ratnagiri district, of Maharashtra. This fort is very small but an important fort in Ratnagiri district for Kanhoji Angre's Navy that evolved as the modern Indian Navy. The Fort is spread over 22 acres and located on a northern hill on Muchkundi River.

topPlaces.name: Gavade Ambere
topPlaces.description: Gavade Ambere is a village in Ratnagiri district in Western India. It had a population of 2,194, according to the 2011 Census of India.

topPlaces.name: Adivare
topPlaces.description: Adivare is a village in Ratnagiri district in the state of Maharashtra, India. The village is administrated by a Sarpanch who is an elected representative of village as per constitution of India and Panchayati raj (India).

items.note: Gavade Ambere is a village in Ratnagiri district in Western India. It had a population of 2,194, according to the 2011 Census of India.

Adivare is a village in Ratnagiri district in the state of Maharashtra, India. The village is administrated by a Sarpanch who is an elected representative of village as per constitution of India and Panchayati raj (India).

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Purnagad Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Purnagad Fort is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Purnagad Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Kolhapur Airport (105 km) and the nearest railway station is Vasco da Gama (Goa) (166 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Purnagad Fort?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Purnagad Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Purnagad Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Purnagad Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Purnagad Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Gavade Ambere, Adivare.
